title: 9-in-1 BBQ Tools Set Extra Thick Stainless Steel Grill Tool Set with Storage Bag, Premium Complete BBQ Utensils Set for Outdoor Camping, Heavy Duty BBQ Accessories Kit for Men and Women Gift
features: A COMPLETE BBQ TOOLS SET : Essential starter set for barbecue lover, This grill set contains everything you need for all your BBQs: 1 Large clip, 1 baking spatula, 1 double-ended fork, 1 steel cleaning brush, 1 grill essential tool, 1 oil brush with long handle, 2 meat claws, 1 storage bag. This high quality BBQ set comes with everything needed for a successful cook out.

PREMIUM QUALITY BBQ ACCESSORIES - All the barbecue tools are made from high quality stainless steel that won't rust, won't crack like wood quality do. Plus, thanks to an innovative process, the extra thick blades offer remarkable durability and strength for Unrivaled Performance. Easy to use and dishwasher-safe.

LONG HANDLE & KEEP YOU SAFE - Long-handled BBQ tool set to ensure a safe distance without worry of getting burned. The non-slip handle is more durable and safe than wood or rubber-handle tools. BBQ tool set also includes food grade PC meat claw, which can be used to tear apart meat foods, such as turkey, beef, pork, etc. Never burn your hands again.

BBQ TOOLS WITH STORAGE BAG - Keep all barbecue utensils set stays in order and protected in the lightweight case. Take this barbecue accessories with you when you are on the go travelling, camping or hiking. Choose the perfect grilling tool to enjoy grilling in front of your friends.

PERFECT GIFT FOR MEN WOMEN - You will absolutely love this stainless steel shiny BBQ utensil set upon first glance. The BBQ accessories set is an ideal gift for foodies, barbecue fans, cooks, camping lovers as well as a perfect gift for men, dad, lover, family, friends, barbecue enthusiasts, etc.
